strengths: ~20 years of continuous hands-on engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, high-performance systems, and devops — comfortably meets the 15-year minimum
Demonstrated entrepreneurial track record through GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform), multiple OSS libraries, and founding-level product ownership
Recent engagement with AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, showing active pivot toward the AI tooling space
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent (April 2025 onward); no demonstrated history of building or shipping AI-powered products or platforms at scale
No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field, and no cloud platform background — both are strongly preferred for a director-level AI strategy role

Career trajectory and current title ('Senior Software Developer') do not reflect the director-level individual contributor scope required — no evidence of strategic customer advising, cross-org influence, or thought leadership at that level

key_factors.factor: Technical breadth and years of experience

response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable full-stack engineer with genuine breadth and two decades of experience, but the role demands a director-level AI strategist with deep, demonstrable AI/ML expertise, cloud platform fluency, and a history of advising large customers and shaping organizational direction — none of which are present in the resume. His recent AI work is infrastructure tooling, not strategic AI product development, and his career arc remains firmly in senior individual contributor territory without the leadership or advisory scope the position requires.
